text: Thee do we worship, and Thine aid we seek.
On no soul doth Allah place a burden greater than it can bear.
Verily, with every difficulty there is relief.
Then do ye remember Me; I will remember you.
For without doubt in the remembrance of Allah do hearts find rest.
And if anyone puts his trust in Allah, sufficient is Allah for him.
Say: O My servants who have transgressed against their souls, despair not of the mercy of Allah. Indeed, Allah forgives all sins.
The parable of those who spend their wealth in the way of Allah is that of a grain which grows seven ears, in each ear a hundred grains.
Allah invites to the Home of Peace.
Peace be upon you for what you patiently endured.
It is He who sent down tranquility into the hearts of the believers.
Indeed, Allah does not like corrupters.
Enter it in peace, safe and secure.
And reconciliation is best.
When you enter houses, greet one another with a greeting from Allah, blessed and good.
He is Al-Salam, the Giver of Peace, the Overseer, the Exalted in Might.
Peace be upon Noah among all the worlds.
Their greeting the Day they meet Him will be: Peace.
He will love them and they will love Him.
And He placed between you affection and mercy.
Indeed, Allah loves the doers of good.
Indeed, Allah loves those who are constantly repentant and loves those who purify themselves.
And Allah loves the steadfast.
Say: If you love Allah, then follow me; Allah will love you and forgive your sins.
Indeed, Allah loves those who act justly.
He has bestowed upon you His favors, both apparent and hidden.
When you have decided, then rely upon Allah. Indeed, Allah loves those who rely upon Him.
Your Lord has decreed upon Himself mercy.
Allah is the Creator of all things, and He is Guardian over all things.
Allah restricts and extends His provision to whom He wills.
If you are grateful, I will surely increase you in favor.
Ask Allah of His bounty.
And it is He who subjected the sea for you to eat from it tender meat.
Allah provides for whom He wills without account.
And never say of anything: Indeed, I will do that tomorrow, except when adding: If Allah wills.
And give you increase in wealth and children and provide for you gardens and rivers.
And whoever fears Allah, He will make for him a way out and will provide for him from where he does not expect.
For indeed, with hardship will be ease.
Perhaps Allah will bring about after that a different matter.
Indeed, Allah does not allow to be lost the reward of the doers of good.
And your Lord is never forgetful.
Perhaps you dislike a thing and it is good for you; and perhaps you love a thing and it is bad for you.
Those will be granted a great reward by Allah.
Do not despair of relief from Allah. Indeed, no one despairs of relief from Allah except the disbelieving people.
Indeed, Allah is with the patient.
Those who believe are most intense in love for Allah.
The believers are but brothers.
Whoever believes in Allah and the Last Day and does righteous deeds will have their reward with their Lord.
Allah is the ally of those who believe. He brings them out from darknesses into the light.
If Allah should aid you, no one can overcome you.
Certainly will the believers have succeeded.
Whoever believes in Allah, He will guide his heart.
Faith is what is settled in the heart and confirmed by deeds.
Power belongs entirely to Allah.
Seek help through patience and prayer.
Stand firm and remember Allah much.
Allah keeps firm those who believe, with the firm word, in worldly life and in the Hereafter.
Do not weaken and do not grieve, and you will be superior if you are true believers.
Allah gives His sovereignty to whom He wills; and Allah is All-Encompassing, All-Knowing.
Call upon Me; I will respond to you.
Do not weaken, for Allah is with you.
All praise is due to Allah, Lord of the worlds.
And few of My servants are grateful.
And if you should count the favors of Allah, you could not enumerate them.
Say: It is He who has produced you and made for you hearing and vision and hearts.
Eat of the good things which We have provided for you and be grateful to Allah.
Be grateful to Me and to your parents.
Allah will reward the grateful.
So pardon with gracious pardoning.
Let them pardon and overlook. Would you not like that Allah should forgive you?
And to remit is nearer to righteousness.
Turn to Allah in repentance, all of you, O believers, that you might succeed.
Indeed, my Lord is Merciful and Loving.
If you avoid the major sins which you are forbidden, We will remove from you your lesser sins.
Repel evil with that which is better.
He gives wisdom to whom He wills, and whoever has been given wisdom has certainly been given much good.
Say: My Lord, increase me in knowledge.
Allah will raise those who have believed among you and those who were given knowledge, by degrees.
Read in the name of your Lord who created.
Indeed, it is You who is the Knowing, the Wise.
Above every possessor of knowledge is one more knowing.
So take warning, O you of vision.
He taught man that which he knew not.
Say: Are those who know equal to those who do not know?
Be patient; indeed, Allah is with the patient.
Do not grieve; indeed Allah is with us.
And sufficient is Allah as Protector.
He is Knowing of that within the breasts.
Indeed, Allah does not allow to be lost the reward of the doers of good.
Allah is Subtle with His servants.
